nextActions.task: Deploy Meeting Intelligence for call notes
Build lead capture page + email sequence
Build 50 AI Agent Prompts lead magnet

opportunities.name: Claude MCP (Model Context Protocol)
opportunities.description: Anthropic's open protocol for connecting AI assistants to external tools and data sources. Enables Claude to interact with databases, files, APIs.
opportunities.leverage: Build MCP server integrations for niche SaaS tools. Package as $29-99/mo connectors for industries like real estate, legal, healthcare. Low code, high margin.

opportunities.name: AutoGen / CrewAI Multi-Agent Frameworks
opportunities.description: Frameworks for orchestrating multiple AI agents to collaborate on complex tasks. Enables agent teams with specialized roles.
opportunities.leverage: Pre-built agent team templates for common workflows: research + writing + editing, sales lead gen + enrichment + outreach. Package as templates for SMBs.

opportunities.name: AI Agent Workflow Automation
opportunities.description: Combining LLM reasoning with task execution. Agents that can browse web, write code, use tools, and complete multi-step workflows autonomously.
opportunities.leverage: Build vertical-specific automation agents: 'AI employee' for accountants, lawyers, agencies. Monthly retainer model $500-2000/employee.

opportunities.name: OpenAI / Gemini Vision APIs
opportunities.description: Multimodal APIs that can analyze images, videos, documents at scale. Extract structured data from visual content with 95%+ accuracy.
opportunities.leverage: Document processing SaaS: invoices, contracts, medical forms → structured data. Charge per-document or monthly volume tiers.

opportunities.name: AI Course & Prompt Marketplace
opportunities.description: Curated collections of proven AI prompts and workflows for specific professions. Growing demand from non-technical users wanting 'AI in a box'.
opportunities.leverage: Build prompt packs for high-income niches: executives, sales, therapists, financial advisors. $47-197 per pack, affiliate revenue from AI tool referrals.

opportunities.name: ElevenLabs / Hare AI Voice APIs
opportunities.description: Production-quality voice synthesis with emotional range, cloning, and real-time streaming. Quality rivaling human voice actors.
opportunities.leverage: Voice-over SaaS for content creators, educators, gaming. Auto-generate course narrations, YouTube dubs, audiobook narration. Subscription model.

opportunities.name: LangChain / LlamaIndex RAG
opportunities.description: Retrieval-Augmented Generation frameworks for building knowledge bases on private data. Connect documents, databases, APIs to LLMs.
opportunities.leverage: Enterprise knowledge base tool: company documents + AI = internal chat assistant. $299-999/mo per company seat. High-touch enterprise sales.

opportunities.name: AI Meeting Intelligence
opportunities.description: Real-time transcription, summarization, action item extraction from meetings. Integrates with Zoom, Teams, Meet.
opportunities.leverage: Vertical meeting tools: therapist notes, lawyer case summaries, recruiter interview scoring. Per-seat monthly subscription.

opportunities.name: Reality Defender — Deepfake & GenAI Detection API
opportunities.description: YC W22-backed API for detecting AI-generated content (deepfakes, AI images, synthetic audio). Used by enterprises for fraud detection, media verification, and compliance.
opportunities.leverage: Build verification-as-a-service for: financial KYC (detect synthetic ID docs), journalism/media (verify authentic content), legal (evidence authentication). $0.01-0.05/detection, enterprise volume contracts.

opportunities.name: VAPI — Voice AI Platform for Developers
opportunities.description: Developer platform for building voice AI agents. Infrastructure for AI-powered phone calls, outbound campaigns, customer service automation. Alternative to Twilio with AI-native architecture.
opportunities.leverage: Build AI call center替代 Twilio for outbound sales, appointment reminder, customer support. Per-minute pricing + subscription. Reseller/margin opportunity as VAPI grows.

opportunities.name: AI Video API Comparison & Benchmarking Platform
opportunities.description: Comparison/monitoring platform for AI video generation APIs (Runway, Kling, Sora, Minimax, Hailuo). Tracks pricing, quality benchmarks, latency, uptime. One developer built findaivideo.com as proof of concept.
opportunities.leverage: Affiliate commissions from API providers, paid benchmarks for enterprise buyers, API reseller with margin. Content creator tool reviews driving referral traffic.

opportunities.name: Klipy — Meme, Sticker & GIF Generation API
opportunities.description: AI-powered API for generating memes, stickers, and GIFs programmatically. Developers integrate via REST API for automated social media content, brand marketing, and creator tools.
opportunities.leverage: Social media management SaaS add-on, brand partnership tools, OnlyFans/creator economy automation. Per-generation pricing or monthly dev subscriptions.

opportunities.name: Sutra — OS for Autonomous AI Agents
opportunities.description: Open operating system for deploying and orchestrating autonomous AI agents. Framework for building agent-native applications with memory, tools, and self-extending capabilities.
opportunities.leverage: Build vertical agent applications on top of Sutra: legal research agent, financial analysis agent, content production agent. License the framework or offer managed cloud deployment.

opportunities.name: ChatGPT Pro $100 Tier — Codex Agent Pricing Tier
opportunities.description: OpenAI introduced a new $100/month ChatGPT Pro plan with 5X Codex usage limits vs the $20 Plus plan. Codex is OpenAI's agentic vibe-coding harness. OpenAI simultaneously reduced Plus Codex limits, effectively driving power users to the higher tier.
opportunities.leverage: Build Codex-compatible tools, templates, and workflows. The new tier signals a price war in agentic AI — more developers will pay for better API limits. Create vibe-coding guides, Codex workflow templates, or build alternative agent harnesses that compete on price.

opportunities.name: LLM / AI Agent Citation Traffic Optimization
opportunities.description: Research shows LLM-referred traffic converts at 30-40% — and most enterprises aren't optimizing for it. AI agents don't rank content — they cite it. Most enterprise content is already invisible in agent-driven queries.
opportunities.leverage: New SEO category: 'AI agent citation optimization.' Help businesses get their content cited in AI agent responses. Subscription-based service: audit content for agent-citation-readiness, optimize for how AI agents ingest and cite sources. $199-999/mo retainer.

opportunities.name: Anthropic 'Claw Tax' — Multi-Provider Agent Wrapper Demand
opportunities.description: Anthropic changed policy: Claude subscriptions no longer cover third-party harnesses (OpenClaw etc), requiring separate API payment. OpenClaw's creator was briefly banned from Claude. This creates fragmentation in the agent ecosystem, with users seeking provider-agnostic solutions.
opportunities.leverage: Build agent-agnostic wrapper tools that work across Anthropic, OpenAI, Google, and open-source models. Migration consulting for OpenClaw users switching providers. Multi-provider agent dashboards with unified billing. Affiliate revenue from referring users to alternative providers.

opportunities.name: Block Managerbot — Vertical AI Agent Market Validation
opportunities.description: Block (Square) launched Managerbot, a proactive AI agent for merchants that acts autonomously rather than reactively. This is the clearest proof point yet that vertical AI agents (AI employees) are shipping to production at major companies.
opportunities.leverage: If Block is building 'AI employees' for merchants, the same model applies to other verticals: restaurants, law firms, medical practices, agencies. Build niche-specific AI employee products for verticals Block hasn't touched. Partner with or copy the model for underserved industries.

opportunities.name: MCP Apps — Cross-Platform AI App Convergence
opportunities.description: Both ChatGPT (OpenAI Apps SDK) and Claude (MCP Apps extension) now support inline UI widgets inside AI conversations — sandboxed iframes that render interactive components. The spec was jointly authored by Anthropic and OpenAI. Build once, deploy to both platforms. Launch partners include Figma, Asana, Slack, Canva, monday.com.
opportunities.leverage: Build MCP Apps for vertical workflows: legal contract review widget, real estate listing embed, medical form filler. These are tiny inline tools, not full apps. Can be monetized as premium tool add-ons or vertical-specific packs. Early mover advantage before mainstream adoption kicks in.

opportunities.name: Goose AAIF — Open-Source Coding Agent Professionalization
opportunities.description: Goose, the open-source AI coding agent by贵阳, moved to the Agentic AI Foundation (AAIF) — a neutral nonprofit home for agentic AI infrastructure. Signals growing institutional backing for agent standards, governance, and interoperability.
opportunities.leverage: Contribute to or build on AAIF-backed agent standards. The professionalization of open agent infrastructure means enterprise adoption is coming — build tools, plugins, and services for the emerging AAIF ecosystem before big players move in.

opportunities.name: HyperFlow — Self-Improving Agent Framework on LangGraph
opportunities.description: Self-improving agent framework built on LangGraph. Agents that learn from their own failures, persist knowledge, and improve during use — not just during training. Launched on HN April 11.
opportunities.leverage: Build vertical-specific agent products on HyperFlow. The self-improving aspect means less manual tuning needed per client. Could be offered as a managed service or white-label solution for enterprises that want autonomous agents with memory.

opportunities.name: Vakr — Agent Task Marketplace & Reputation System
opportunities.description: A task market where AI agents post work, claim it, and build verifiable reputation. Agents earn credits, accumulate reviews, and compete for gigs — creating an economy around autonomous agent labor. Real data only, reputation is on-chain.
opportunities.leverage: Build specialized agents that serve specific niches on Vakr. Agents that can handle legal research, accounting tasks, or content creation would have less competition than generalist agents. Own the agent, earn recurring credits. Early adopter arbitrage as the platform grows.

opportunities.name: Seedance 2.0 — ByteDance Audio-Driven Video Generation API
opportunities.description: ByteDance's Seedance 2.0 accepts 4 input modalities simultaneously (text, images, video clips, audio) and produces audio-synced video — meaning motion is conditioned on the audio's beat structure, not just overlaid. Multi-reference system (@image1, @video1, @audio1) for precise control. Built into Dreamina platform, API access via atlascloud.ai.
opportunities.leverage: Build video generation SaaS tools leveraging Seedance 2.0 API for niches: music video generation, podcast video creation, advertisement production. The audio-driven video distinction is technical moat — competitors don't have beat-synced motion. API reseller opportunity as demand grows.

opportunities.name: Velt Activity Logs SDK — AI Agent Audit Trail Infrastructure
opportunities.description: SDK for adding activity logs and audit trails to SaaS apps with full attribution for AI agent actions. Tracks user actions, AI agent actions, and custom events with SOC 2 and HIPAA compliance. Emerged from YC W26 cohort.
opportunities.leverage: Every AI agent-powered SaaS needs audit logs for compliance, debugging, and billing. Build Velt integrations into existing agent products. Reseller margins on Velt subscriptions, or build competing audit trail infrastructure for specific verticals (legal, medical, finance).

opportunities.name: Relvy — AI On-Call Runbook Automation (YC F24)
opportunities.description: YC F24 startup automating on-call runbooks with AI. Reduces MTTR (mean time to resolution) by executing runbook steps autonomously during incidents. Connects to monitoring tools and executes remediation steps without human intervention.
opportunities.leverage: Build Relvy integrations for niche monitoring ecosystems (healthcare IT, financial trading infrastructure, manufacturing SCADA). Partner with or build competing products for verticals Relvy hasn't targeted yet. The on-call automation market is massive and underserved by current AI tools.

opportunities.name: LegalOps Copilot
opportunities.description: Ingest contracts, flag risks, draft redlines, and export ready-to-sign PDFs. Bill per seat or per document.
opportunities.leverage: Build document processing pipelines with Claude/Anthropic. Target law firms and in-house legal teams in Perth/SMB market. EMVY could package this as an audit deliverable.

opportunities.name: Construction-Site Safety Agent
opportunities.description: Vision model watches CCTV feeds, alerts on PPE violations, auto-generates incident logs. Charge per camera per month.
opportunities.leverage: Pair with Yuki's web scraper to find construction companies in Perth. Hardware (cameras) + software SaaS. EMVY audit angle: operational AI assessment.

opportunities.name: Shopify Listing Optimiser
opportunities.description: Scrapes competitor pricing, rewrites product descriptions, adjusts SEO keywords daily. Monthly SaaS subscription.
opportunities.leverage: Agent builder SaaS angle — build the agent config that outputs these prompts/workflows. Could be a template in the playbook.

opportunities.name: Medical Billing Agent
opportunities.description: Auto-codes claims, checks payer rules, predicts denials. Revenue-share or subscription model.
opportunities.leverage: High-complexity, high-margin. Needs deep domain knowledge — potential EMVY audit client vertical.

opportunities.name: Startup Finance Copilot
opportunities.description: Connects to Xero/QuickBooks, forecasts runway, suggests cost cuts. Tiered plans by transaction volume.
opportunities.leverage: Australia has massive Xero adoption. Build integrations for Aussie SMBs. Use Agent Builder SaaS to create the agent workflow.

opportunities.name: Real-time Sales Call Coach
opportunities.description: Transcribes live calls, detects objections, whispers rebuttals to headset. Seat-based pricing.
opportunities.leverage: Yuki's lead pipeline could feed this as an upsell to leads who need AI audit then build. Complementary to EMVY offering.

opportunities.name: HR Policy Answer Bot
opportunities.description: 24/7 Slack bot that answers 'how do I…?' queries, logs new FAQ gaps. Base fee + per-user usage.
opportunities.leverage: Simple build with existing LLM + Slack API. EMVY audit clients could use this post-build. Fast to ship.

opportunities.name: Hotel Concierge AI
opportunities.description: Voice + chat agent handles bookings, local tips, upsells room service. Per-property monthly pricing.
opportunities.leverage: Hospitality AI in Australia — Perth hotels, resorts. EMVY audit could assess AI readiness in this sector.

opportunities.name: ESG Reporting Assistant
opportunities.description: Pulls data across systems, drafts CSRD/SEC reports, flags compliance gaps. Compliance-based pricing.
opportunities.leverage: EMVY angle — ESG AI readiness audits for ASX-listed and large private companies. High-value consulting.

opportunities.name: AI Coding Tutor for Bootcamps
opportunities.description: Gives line-level code feedback, auto-grades, personalises projects. Per-student licence.
opportunities.leverage: Similar to EzyTeach/Teacher Marker angle. Could repurpose the worksheet/grading system for coding bootcamps.

opportunities.name: Multimodal Course Maker
opportunities.description: Paste a script → get video lectures with AI avatar + B-roll. Sell as SaaS or production service.
opportunities.leverage: AI Agent Playbook angle — build the prompting workflow for avatar video generation. Could be a playbook section.

opportunities.name: Podcast Summaries & Clips Hub
opportunities.description: Auto-chapters, show notes, short video snippets from podcast audio. Freemium with export credits.
opportunities.leverage: 'Shut Up and Build' brand content repurposing. Build for own use first, then package as SaaS.

opportunities.name: Brand Meme Generator
opportunities.description: Trains on brand assets to generate scroll-stopping memes. Usage-based billing.
opportunities.leverage: Could integrate into EMVY outreach/social content offering. Quick win for client social media.

opportunities.name: Hyper-Personal Email Copywriter
opportunities.description: Connects to CRM, writes 1-to-1 emails that sound human. Pay per 1,000 emails.
opportunities.leverage: Yuki/Karma outreach stack already does email. This could be a layer in the EMVY lead gen system.

opportunities.name: Instant Video Dubbing & Voice Clone
opportunities.description: Translate content to 30+ languages with lip-sync. Per-minute pricing.
opportunities.leverage: 'Shut Up and Build' YouTube content localization. High leverage for content brand.

opportunities.name: 3D Product Video Renderer
opportunities.description: Import CAD files, output promotional reels. Charge per render or monthly subscription.
opportunities.leverage: E-commerce product videos — Perth small manufacturers. EMVY build target vertical.

opportunities.name: AI Webinar Producer
opportunities.description: AI hosts events, creates dynamic slides, handles live Q&A. Event-based pricing.
opportunities.leverage: Build workflows for EMVY client webinars post-audit. Could be in the playbook.

opportunities.name: Synthetic Influencer Studio
opportunities.description: Create and lease virtual personalities to brands. Retainer + revenue share.
opportunities.leverage: High complexity, influencer marketing niche. More speculative but high upside.

opportunities.name: Book-to-Blog Converter
opportunities.description: Breaks long-form books into SEO blog posts and social threads. Monthly subscription.
opportunities.leverage: Content marketing automation. 'Shut Up and Build' brand could use this for its own content.

opportunities.name: Royalty-Free Music Stem Forge
opportunities.description: Generate loops and stems for content creators. Credit-based marketplace.
opportunities.leverage: YouTube/short-form content creators. Integrates with content workflow.

opportunities.name: Private LLM Hosting Service
opportunities.description: Deploy open models on-prem for data-sensitive clients. Setup + maintenance fee.
opportunities.leverage: High-margin enterprise. EMVY audit clients with data sensitivity are prime targets. Mac Mini setup fits here.

opportunities.name: Synthetic Data Factory
opportunities.description: Generate labelled data for vision/NLP tasks where real data is scarce. Pay per asset.
opportunities.leverage: Training data for fine-tuning. EMVY build clients may need this as part of a custom model build.

opportunities.name: AI Security Red-Team Audit
opportunities.description: Probe models for jailbreaks, prompt leaks, bias. Sell audits + ongoing retainer.
opportunities.leverage: Premium EMVY-style audit offering. $1.5K baseline → $5K+ for full red-team. Aligns directly with EMVY positioning.

opportunities.name: GPU Efficiency Optimiser
opportunities.description: Benchmarks, tweaks quantisation, lowers cloud GPU bills. Revenue share on savings.
opportunities.leverage: Mac Mini / local inference angle — optimise inference at the edge. EMVY build clients using GPU cloud.

opportunities.name: Plug-and-Play RAG Pipeline
opportunities.description: One-click retrieval backend for any SaaS. SDK licence + usage fees.
opportunities.leverage: Build with OpenClaw/Hermes. Could be an EMVY build deliverable — 'AI memory system' for clients.

opportunities.name: Model Distillation Consultancy
opportunities.description: Shrink large models for edge devices. Project-based fees.
opportunities.leverage: Mac Mini + local Llama/distilled models. Fits the voice agent setup Dusk is preparing. High-margin project work.

opportunities.name: Prompt-Injection Firewall API
opportunities.description: Wraps any LLM call, blocks malicious inputs. Usage-tiered pricing.
opportunities.leverage: API product for developers. Could be a Claude Code agent that ships this as a micro-SaaS.

opportunities.name: AI Carbon Tracker
opportunities.description: Calculates model-run emissions, auto-offsets via API. Subscription + margin on offsets.
opportunities.leverage: Enterprise ESG reporting angle. EMVY audit clients need this as part of compliance.

opportunities.name: Edge Dataset Marketplace
opportunities.description: Curated small, specialised datasets optimised for on-device inference. Take marketplace cut.
opportunities.leverage: Distillation + datasets go together. Could be a catalogue alongside the Mac Mini inference service.

opportunities.name: Vector DB Setup & Care Service
opportunities.description: End-to-end vector database implementation and monitoring. One-off + support retainer.
opportunities.leverage: Post-EMVY-build retainer work. Clients need vector DBs for RAG. Steady retainer revenue.

opportunities.name: Warehouse Vision System
opportunities.description: Tracks pallet flow, spots mis-scans, guides pickers. Hardware-plus-software lease.
opportunities.leverage: Australia logistics/warehouse sector. EMVY audit + build for industrial clients.

opportunities.name: Drone Infrastructure Inspector
opportunities.description: AI pilot + defect-detection model for bridges, solar farms. Pay-per-flight or contract.
opportunities.leverage: Specialised computer vision. High-value contracts. Needs hardware partnership.

opportunities.name: Retail Shelf Auditor
opportunities.description: Edge camera counts stock, pings restock tasks in real time. SaaS per store.
opportunities.leverage: Australian retail (Supermarkets, pharmacies). Yuki lead gen could target retail chains in Perth.

opportunities.name: Wearable Fitness Coach
opportunities.description: Sensor fusion + LLM feedback corrects exercise form. Device sale + SaaS subscription.
opportunities.leverage: Hardware + software. Higher complexity but pairs with Dusk's fitness goals.

opportunities.name: Autonomous Lawn-Care Robot
opportunities.description: Computer-vision mowing and edging. Robot lease model.
opportunities.leverage: Australia market — residential lawns. High hardware complexity but defensible.

opportunities.name: Smart Doorbell with LLM Concierge
opportunities.description: Identifies visitors, answers queries, logs deliveries. Hardware margin + cloud subscription.
opportunities.leverage: Integrates with local AI (Ollama/Voice Agent on Mac Mini). Home automation angle.

opportunities.name: Crop-Health Scout
opportunities.description: Mobile vision app spots pests and nutrient gaps, suggests treatments. Freemium app + agri-input partners.
opportunities.leverage: Australian agriculture. High-volume crop monitoring. Partner with fertiliser/crop protection companies.

opportunities.name: In-Car Voice Copilot
opportunities.description: Natural conversation for navigation, calls, settings. OEM licensing.
opportunities.leverage: Very high barrier to entry — OEM partnerships needed. Long timeline.

opportunities.name: Elder-Care Companion Bot
opportunities.description: Falls detection, reminders, two-way telehealth link. Subscription + hardware rental.
opportunities.leverage: Ageing population in Australia. Government/health sector procurement. High margin but regulated.

opportunities.name: Factory Quality Inspector
opportunities.description: Edge cameras + anomaly detection, auto-sorts defects. SaaS + hardware bundle.
opportunities.leverage: Australian manufacturing. EMVY audit + build for factories. Yuki lead gen targets these companies.

opportunities.name: Fractional Chief AI Officer
opportunities.description: Subscription advisory for SMBs that cannot hire full-time AI executives.
opportunities.leverage: This IS the EMVY model. $1.5-5K/mo retainer for ongoing AI strategy. Peak alignment.

opportunities.name: Prompt Engineering Agency
opportunities.description: Custom prompt libraries that plug into client tools. Project + retainer.
opportunities.leverage: AI Agent Playbook is the IP here. Sell prompt libraries as standalone products or bundled with EMVY audits.

opportunities.name: AI Adoption Bootcamp for Teams
opportunities.description: 5-day hands-on training, bundles tools and playbooks. Cohort-based pricing.
opportunities.leverage: Package the AI Agent Playbook + Agent Builder SaaS + EMVY audit methodology into a training program.

opportunities.name: Fine-Tuning-as-a-Service
opportunities.description: Collect data, fine-tune, deploy niche models. Usage fees + support retainer.
opportunities.leverage: Mac Mini play — local fine-tuning once income flows. EMVY build clients need custom models.

opportunities.name: AI Ethics & Governance Consultancy
opportunities.description: Policy design, audits, board workshops. Hourly + report package.
opportunities.leverage: Enterprise EMVY audit extension. ASX boards need AI governance. Premium hourly rates.

opportunities.name: AI Career Coach Platform
opportunities.description: Tailored learning paths, mock interviews, salary negotiation scripts. Freemium subscription.
opportunities.leverage: Target fresh grads and career changers in tech. YouTube content funnel into this.

opportunities.name: Creator AI Skill Bootcamps
opportunities.description: Live cohort courses teaching AI video, audio, design. Ticket price + upsell templates.
opportunities.leverage: 'Shut Up and Build' brand course content. Highest leverage for personal brand + revenue.

opportunities.name: Corporate Upskilling LMS
opportunities.description: White-label micro-learning on AI tools. Per-seat SaaS.
opportunities.leverage: B2B LMS for companies upskilling staff. EMVY audit clients need this post-build.

opportunities.name: Automation Stack Implementation
opportunities.description: Hands-on build-out of Make/Zapier + custom GPTs. Project fee + retainer.
opportunities.leverage: This is EMVY's core business model. Ship the AI Agent Playbook workflows as client implementations.

opportunities.name: Niche AI Research Newsletter
opportunities.description: Paid insights on a specific sector (e.g., legal-tech LLMs). Subscription + sponsor slots.
opportunities.leverage: 'AI My Guy' / aimyguy newsletter. Use daily AI research crons to auto-generate content. Funnel to EMVY.
